title: Red cPvP Pack
description: CPVP Pack is a clean and powerful Minecraft PvP texture pack designed for smooth gameplay and intense battles. Featuring a red crystal-themed style and optimized visuals for better FPS, this pack gives your PvP experience
body: Do you play Crystal PvP and find the original textures too plain, or does your game lag because of effects? Then this pack might be perfect for you. It includes a clean red-themed sword, pickaxe, ender pearl, and crossbow, along with a smaller red totem and crosshair that don’t block your screen. You also get effectless red crystals with matching obsidian for a smoother and cleaner experience. If you like the color red, this pack is a great choice for you.
